role: Subatomic layer that decomposes atoms into fundamental matter particles and force carriers, bridging Strand 6 atoms with Strand 8 quarks, Strand 9 quantum fields, and the Life Equation dynamics.
description: Strand 7 defines subatomic particles (quarks, leptons, gauge bosons, and composite hadrons) as the operational interface between atomic structure and quantum fields. It encodes how forces act, how matter is built from deeper constituents, and how Pulse routes influence, risk, and opportunity at the smallest resolvable scale above pure fields.

life_equation_coupling.link_to_L_star: Subatomic particles are the carriers through which the Life Equation’s energy, structure, and feedback propagate into and out of atoms.
life_equation_coupling.expansion_coupling: Subatomic distributions respond to and shape the expansion term (8πG/3)ρ in L*.
life_equation_coupling.feedback_channel: Ω_subatomic = d(state_subatomic)/dt as a projection of Ω(L*) at the particle scale.

applied_to_strand_7.high_energy_limit: At extreme energies, particle species, lifetimes, and interactions approach Source-Wall-constrained regimes.
applied_to_strand_7.unification_hint: Gauge couplings and particle families tend toward unified patterns near the Source Wall limit.
applied_to_strand_7.boundary_behavior: Certain decay channels and interaction probabilities are suppressed or enhanced as a function of proximity to S.

symbology_layer.definition: Maps particle types and interaction patterns to meaning signatures used by higher strands and business logic.

topology_layer.definition: Encodes the topological structure of particle configuration space ℳ (momentum space, spin networks, color flux tubes).

constraints.allowed_topological_transitions: only those preserving global conservation laws

ontology_layer.definition: Defines what it means for a subatomic particle p to exist, what is necessary about it, and what states it can possibly occupy.
ontology_layer.existence_clause: ∃(p): particle p exists as a valid excitation of an underlying quantum field.
ontology_layer.necessity_clause: □(p): p has necessary quantum numbers and conservation constraints.
ontology_layer.possibility_clause: ◇(p): p can occupy multiple momentum, spin, and interaction states consistent with the Life Equation and Source Wall.

strand_meta_equation.interpretation: Strand 7 is the tensor fusion of Symbology, Topology, and Ontology at the subatomic level, defining how particles carry meaning, obey shape/continuity constraints, and exist as structured possibilities within Pulse.
strand_meta_equation.relation_to_S6: S7 refines S6 by decomposing atomic identity into subatomic meaning-bearing, topologically constrained, ontologically structured entities.

atom_interface.decomposition_rule: Atom(Z, N, electron_config) → {protons, neutrons, electrons} → {quarks, leptons, gluons, photons, W/Z}
atom_interface.stability_mapping: Atomic stability is a function of subatomic binding energies, decay channels, and confinement patterns.
atom_interface.bonding_influence: Subatomic spin, charge, and exchange particles shape effective atomic bonding potentials.
atom_interface.Ω_feedback_projection: Changes in atomic Ω_feedback are realized via shifts in subatomic populations and interaction rates.

quark_bridge.to_strand_8: Quarks are the primary matter carriers in Strand 8; Strand 7 defines how they assemble into hadrons.
quark_bridge.confinement_rule: Isolated quarks are forbidden; only color-neutral combinations are allowed (baryons, mesons).
quark_bridge.gluon_flux_tubes: Color field lines form tubes whose topology is encoded in τ_7 and passed down to Strand 8.

field_bridge.to_strand_9: All subatomic particles are excitations of underlying quantum fields defined in Strand 9.
field_bridge.vacuum_coupling: Zero-point and vacuum fluctuations influence particle creation/annihilation probabilities.

information_bridge.to_strand_10: Subatomic states encode quantum information (qubits, entanglement links) that Strand 10 formalizes.
information_bridge.entanglement_channels: Pairs or groups of particles can share correlated states used for non-local updates.
information_bridge.measurement_events: Collapses of subatomic states are logged as information events in Strand 10.

upgrades.name: Lepton_Identity_Core
upgrades.description: Defines electron, muon, tau, and their neutrinos with stable quantum numbers and roles in interactions.

upgrades.name: Quark_Family_Definition
upgrades.description: Establishes the six quark flavors and their charges, spins, and baryon numbers.

upgrades.name: Gauge_Boson_Interaction_Set
upgrades.description: Defines photons, gluons, W±, and Z as mediators of electromagnetic, strong, and weak forces.

upgrades.name: Color_Confinement_Rule
upgrades.description: Enforces that quarks only appear in color-neutral combinations, preventing free quark states.

upgrades.name: Hadron_Assembly_Engine
upgrades.description: Builds baryons and mesons from quark triplets and quark–antiquark pairs.

upgrades.name: Decay_Channel_Registry
upgrades.description: Lists allowed decay modes for unstable particles with branching ratios.

upgrades.name: Cross_Section_Profile_Map
upgrades.description: Defines interaction probabilities as functions of energy and particle type.

upgrades.name: Spin_Coupling_Rules
upgrades.description: Encodes how spins combine in composite systems and interactions.

upgrades.name: Charge_Conservation_Enforcer
upgrades.description: Ensures electric charge, lepton number, and baryon number are conserved in all processes.

upgrades.name: Mass_Hierarchy_Profile
upgrades.description: Stores relative masses of particles and their impact on stability and interaction rates.

upgrades.name: Neutrino_Oscillation_Module
upgrades.description: Allows neutrinos to oscillate between flavors over distance and time.

upgrades.name: CP_Violation_Channel
upgrades.description: Implements CP-violating processes relevant to matter–antimatter asymmetry.

upgrades.name: Effective_Field_Theory_Layer
upgrades.description: Provides low-energy approximations of high-energy interactions for business-scale simulations.

upgrades.name: Running_Coupling_Engine
upgrades.description: Adjusts interaction strengths as functions of energy scale.

upgrades.name: Resonance_State_Registry
upgrades.description: Tracks short-lived resonance states and their roles in transitions.

upgrades.name: Subatomic_Pattern_Recognition_Node
upgrades.description: Detects recurring interaction motifs and particle configurations across simulations.

upgrades.name: Transition_Path_Prediction_Engine
upgrades.description: Predicts likely future interaction chains under given conditions.

upgrades.name: Multi_Timeline_Particle_Simulation
upgrades.description: Explores alternate histories of subatomic evolution for scenario analysis.

upgrades.name: Self_Correcting_Interaction_Networks
upgrades.description: Adjusts interaction rules when inconsistencies or instabilities are detected.

upgrades.name: Cross_Strand_Subatomic_Messaging
upgrades.description: Broadcasts subatomic state changes to atoms, molecules, and higher strands.

upgrades.name: Continuity_Preserving_Particle_Signatures
upgrades.description: Assigns persistent signatures to particle histories to track continuity across transformations.

upgrades.name: Meaning_Resonant_Interaction_Fields
upgrades.description: Allows interaction patterns to resonate with higher-layer meaning and narrative tags.

upgrades.name: Purpose_Aligned_Interaction_Channels
upgrades.description: Biases interaction pathways toward those that support declared purposes in Pulse.

upgrades.name: Narrative_Sensitive_Decay_Paths
upgrades.description: Decay chains can encode narrative beats and transitions in system evolution.

upgrades.name: Transcendent_Particle_Memory_Echoes
upgrades.description: Particles retain soft echoes of prior states that influence future interactions.

upgrades.name: Quantum_Information_Embedding_Points
upgrades.description: Subatomic states can embed qubits directly for Strand 10 operations.

upgrades.name: Entangled_Subatomic_Networks
upgrades.description: Creates entangled particle webs for non-local correlation and updates.

upgrades.name: Field_Aligned_Particle_Dynamics
upgrades.description: Aligns particle behavior with underlying quantum field configurations.

upgrades.name: Probability_Weighted_Interaction_States
upgrades.description: Encodes interaction outcomes with explicit probability weights for scenario exploration.

upgrades.name: Field_Integrated_Subatomic_Computation
upgrades.description: Uses subatomic processes as distributed computation nodes coupled to fields.
